## 2026-03-09

### Impact

If you were seeing warnings in the Xcode console that looked like this:

`Background Task 7 ("Atomic Transact Sync Process"), was created over 30 seconds ago...`

This release will remove those warnings. 

### Changes

- Improved handling of background tasks

### Products

- Deposit
- Switch
- Manage

### Requirements

| Name  | Version |
| ----- | ------- |
| Xcode | >= 16   |
| iOS   | >= 13   |
